description: One of those best choices for AI democracy.
author: Jeffrey C.
pros: Suitable for user who doesn't have AI/ML related skills, everyone in my team can easily use the software very well. The result predict model is also as accurate as those created by human brain. Team members also can collaborate on the platform, it's enterprise level!
cons: No deep learning algorithms and no plan on roadmap.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Profet AI knows what I need
author: Boto D.
pros: Accurate AI computing result for backtest.
cons: Integration needs many variables to adjust.

review_title: Software with high cost performance ratio
author: Kevin H.
pros: I was surveying AI software for our corporate members, ProfetAI's AutoML platform is very suitable for AI rookies. It doesn't require users to have hundred hours of AI training before using this software. At the same time, the functionalities are quite enough for general-purpose to adopt machine learning technology in daily work.
cons: The lack of deep learning functions and they don't plan to add them in the near future due to company strategy.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Very good choice for AI/ML Adoption.
author: Lisa W.
pros: 1. Very easy to use, it only took few hours of training for hands-on. 2. Excellent customer support. 3. The ability to be integrated with other solutions.
cons: We have encountered system halt issues before, although they can fix issues very quickly

author: Max C.
pros: 1. Comprehensive auto machine learning functionalities. 2. Easy to learn 3. Good support 4. Flexibilities to be integrated with other solutions.
cons: I don't have anything to complain about the software but the UI style.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: A very user-friendly machine learning software
author: Liang H.
pros: Very user-friendly! It only took two hours of training for me to learn how to operate it.
cons: Everything is cool except the UI look. But it's not so important for me to get the job done.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: ProfetAI help us to gain competitive advantages
author: Joyce L.
pros: 1. Comprehensive software capabilities. 2. User-friendly. 3. Strong post-sales support. 4. Good for AI team collaboration.
cons: The UI look and feel is a little bit old school.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Linda C.
pros: Their product _ Profet AI AutoML is really easy to use. The fully automated prediction modeling enables us to create our own learning model without programming. The simulation and optimization functions support our decision-making processes. The real-time analysis is perfect.
cons: There are no aspects of the product that are difficult to use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Ease of use and very affordable and cost effective.
author: Alan W.
pros: Comprehensive features wrap those difficult I/T tech from users.
cons: More real-world-like scenario based sample to help quick pick up the tool into production.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: A good solution for AI rookies
description: A good solution for AI rookies
author: Lola C.
pros: It's quite easy to learn and the functionalities are enough for adopting machine learning technology in my daily work... The technical support is also great, I got quick responses to my questions.
cons: Everything is good, however, it will be even better if it has ETL funcitons.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: The easiest machine learning software I have ever used
author: Peggy L.
pros: 1. user-friendly 2. very short training lifecycle 3. easy for integration with OOTB REST API 4. very nice implement team 5. quick response to inquiries
cons: It's hard to say, the UI is a little bit ugly? but it doesn't bother me much.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Celine C.
pros: User Interface friendly and easily operation
cons: Vauled cost and customer support should be prompt
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I build predict models for indentifying customer buying behavior using past year data, the accuracy is good enough and that helps me a lot in preparing stock in advanced.
author: Frankie F.
pros: It's so easy to use this software. I don't need to have any coding nor algorism knowledge but still can build good quality models
cons: Only English/Chinese interface seems not enough to promote worldwide
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
